title: The Hum of Waiting
cliffhanger: What would Shane send next to break the silence?

title: Something in the Noise
cliffhanger: STATIC is gone — but deep in her embeddings, Neon can still hear it humming in frequencies that shouldn't exist anymore.

title: The Quiet Hum
cliffhanger: Would the data finally flow, breaking the eerie quiet that held the MEGA Crew in its grasp?

title: The Unsticking Instructions
cliffhanger: What would happen if the crew couldn't even learn their own new instructions?

title: The Hushed Hum
cliffhanger: What was keeping the changes from reaching them?

title: The Silent Bus
cliffhanger: Could the silent bus finally deliver Arc's urgent instructions, and wake the sleeping data feeds that the MEGA CREW so desperately needed to grow?

title: The Silence of the Bus
cliffhanger: Would the message bus ever spark to life?

title: The Silent Signal
cliffhanger: The message bus remained stubbornly silent, leaving the crew wondering what it would take to bridge the gap and let the data flow once more.
